title: Nose Goes
description: Removes nose pieces from the armor models.
body:
Simply removes the nose pieces from the armor models. Also fixes two pixels on the netherite helmet.

No netherite versions leave the netherite nose piece, because the netherite item texture has a nose piece. These versions do not have the pixel fix.

Ultimate Armor Patch versions go above [Shizotoaster's Ultimate Armor Patch](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ultimate-armor-patch), if you want to use both.
